column3: MapInfoCard and StoreMap are unused imports in page.tsx
column6: Confirmed: MapInfoCard imported at line 18 never used in JSX. StoreMap dynamic import at line 37 never used. StoreMapBlock (different import) used instead.

column3: fetchData() in useEffect has no cleanup, can cause duplicate requests in React 19 strict mode and race conditions
column6: Confirmed: useEffect at line 110-113 calls fetchData() without cleanup function. AbortController created inside fetchData but never aborted on re-run or unmount. React 19 strict mode double-fires effects in dev, causing parallel fetches.
Confirmed: 'next build' outputs warning that middleware file convention is deprecated, should use proxy instead. Not a functional bug but needs migration for Next.js 17+ compatibility.

column3: FirecrawlProvider has placeholder API key stub that could cause confusion
column6: Confirmed: firecrawl_provider.py line 13 has api_key='fc-...' - a placeholder string. Not a security leak (not a real key) but could be misleading for new contributors.
